metadata.selection_note: Compact conditions: history_ok, broke_out, leader_score>=60, cum_vol_ratio_at_trigger>=1.5, trigger_close>=effective_pivot_level*1.01. Same-day ranking uses cum_vol_ratio_at_trigger descending. Portfolio uses 3 slots x 33.33%, +20% half partial, weekly close below 50DMA for normal runners, and +200% peak gain prior-day-low stop for super winners. Industry composite and A+ replacement are disabled.
